title: Predicting a historic storm earlier with WeatherNext
summary: WeatherNext, Google DeepMind's global weather forecasting AI model, successfully predicted Hurricane Melissa's intensity and track in October 2025, providing advance warning that enabled evacuation decisions by meteorologists and local authorities. The model demonstrated capability to issue high-confidence forecasts days before the Category 5 hurricane made landfall in Jamaica.
